title: Twi'lek Dancing Girls
content:
{{Top|leg}}
"'''Twi'lek Dancing Girls'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] by [[Deeply Religious]] from their album [[Deeply Religious (album)|''Deeply Religious'']]. It was banned by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-05-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''
